commands.repair_reason: The PR needs maintainer review plus contributor real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not request an automated repair while the external proof gate is mock-only.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete privacy/security concern by exposing local transcript paths through a new gateway row object.; Review finding: [P2] Omit transcript paths from budget status rows — src/gateway/session-utils.ts:1948 (sha=b5ff388be646e7e89d599a4b9396abad0c204362)
commands.review_summary:
The PR persists a pre-prompt estimated context-budget snapshot on session entries and exposes it through `/status` and gateway session rows when fresh provider token usage is unavailable.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection of the PR diff shows the new snapshot can include `sessionFile` and the gateway row copies the snapshot wholesale. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs maintainer review plus contributor real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not request an automated repair while the external proof gate is mock-only.

target.title: feat(agents): expose estimated context budget status
target.body:
## Summary

Expose OpenClaw's own pre-prompt context budget estimate on session/status surfaces when fresh provider token usage is unavailable.

- capture a typed `contextBudgetStatus` snapshot from the pre-prompt estimate
- persist that snapshot on `SessionEntry`
- expose it on gateway session rows
- let `/status` show estimated context usage only when fresh provider usage is unavailable or absent
- keep positive fresh `totalTokens` authoritative
- prevent preserved-runtime heartbeat runs from replacing the main session's budget snapshot
- reserve the new top-level session field from plugin session-entry slot mirroring

This is reporting-only. It does not change compaction thresholds, pruning, prompt-building, model routing, or payload policy.

Refs #80594, #54996, #77992, #84490, #83177, #43009, #83526, #8635.

## Verification

- `git diff --check refs/remotes/openclaw/main...HEAD`
- `.\node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.CMD --check src/agents/command/session-store.ts src/agents/command/session-store.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache/budget2-session-store node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/session-store.test.ts -t "heartbeat bleed fix" --reporter=verbose`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Sessions whose model/provider path cannot return fresh context usage can expose OpenClaw's own pre-prompt estimate instead of showing only unknown/zero context usage, while heartbeat/preserved-runtime runs cannot overwrite the main session's budget snapshot.

Real environment tested: Windows isolated worktree rebased on `openclaw/main` at `79be940130` with local dependencies installed by `pnpm install`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check refs/remotes/openclaw/main...HEAD`; `.\node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.CMD --check src/agents/command/session-store.ts src/agents/command/session-store.test.ts`; `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache/budget2-session-store node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/command/session-store.test.ts -t "heartbeat bleed fix" --reporter=verbose`.

Evidence after fix: Whitespace and formatting checks passed. The focused heartbeat regression passed in both `agents-core` and `agents-support`, proving a preserved-runtime heartbeat keeps the existing Anthropic model/window and existing Anthropic budget snapshot instead of replacing it with the heartbeat Ollama snapshot.

Observed result after fix: Status can render estimated context budget data from normal session runs, but preserved-runtime heartbeat updates do not change the stored `contextBudgetStatus` used by `/status` and gateway session rows.

What was not tested: Full Vitest files, broad `pnpm check:changed`, and a live `/status` or gateway session-row run were not rerun locally.
